headline: 3 Reasons CVS is Risky and 1 Stock to Buy Instead
summary: Although the S&P 500 is down 1.9% over the past six months, CVS Health’s stock price has fallen further to $71.09, losing shareholders 6.9% of their capital. This might have investors contemplating their next move.

headline: CVS Health and FTC Staff Agree to Proposed Insulin Settlement
summary: The agreement would cover the company’s Caremark pharmacy benefit manager unit, which has denied wrongdoing.

headline: CVS reaches insulin pricing settlement with FTC
summary: By Amina Niasse March 24 (Reuters) - CVS Health said on Tuesday it has reached a proposed settlement agreement with the Federal Trade Commission on insulin pricing.

headline: 1 S&P 500 Stock to Target This Week and 2 We Ignore
summary: The S&P 500 (^GSPC) is home to the biggest and most well-known companies in the market, making it a go-to index for investors seeking stability. But not all large-cap stocks are created equal - some are struggling with slowing growth, declining margins, or increased competition.

headline: CVS, FTC reach proposed settlement in insulin pricing case
summary: A settlement between CVS' pharmacy benefit manager and antitrust regulators would leave UnitedHealth as the sole holdout in high-profile suit.

headline: Wall Street Bulls Look Optimistic About CVS Health (CVS): Should You Buy?
summary: The average brokerage recommendation (ABR) for CVS Health (CVS) is equivalent to a Buy. The overly optimistic recommendations of Wall Street analysts make the effectiveness of this highly sought-after metric questionable. So, is it worth buying the stock?
